title: something different HA_40331 Enamel Mug | Pumpkin Spice | 1pc. 165g, White
features: PACKAGE INCLUDES: Pumpkin Spice Enamel Mug, 1pc. 165g
PUMPKIN SPICE DESIGN: Get cozy with this autumnal enamel-style mug that features 'Pumpkin spice and everything nice' text accented with classic autumn foliage which makes it a very exciting design.
USE ANYWHERE: This Enamel Mug can be used anywhere and is perfect for travelling and campting trip or sipping your favorite drink at home.
MATERIAL: This Mug is made of enamel and is safe to use but do not put them in the microwave, use over open flame or subject them to high heat.
CHARMING: Your favourite seasonal beverage deserves the perfect mug, and this charming enamel mug is just that.
description: Our Pumpkin Spice Enamel Mug will stand up to many hot beverages to come and will be your perfect fall companion especially If you are a lover of all things comfy, cozy and pumpkin-y.
